segments.description: Opening with tense atmospheric underscore beneath dialogue
Action build-up with percussive score and dialogue overlays
Rising music intensity leading to climax with spoken overlays
Music-led segment with rock vocals and instrumental hook, partially masked by SFX
Post-song action with continued score bed and dialogue
Final dialogue and promotional segment with music fade and SFX

summary: An intense trailer with dialogue-driven narrative, building action sequences, a prominent rock song segment featuring audible lyrics, and a concluding promotional call-to-action.
